name: dotnet_binja
description: Standalone Binary Ninja plugin scaffold: CIL architecture + .NET (CLI) binary view.
longdescription: Decodes and lifts CIL/MSIL and lays out .NET assembly method bodies as functions by parsing ECMA-335 metadata. Skeleton — metadata parsing and full opcode coverage are TODO.

installinstructions.Darwin: Symlink or copy this directory into ~/Library/Application Support/Binary Ninja/plugins/
installinstructions.Linux: Symlink or copy this directory into ~/.binaryninja/plugins/
